name: Amata Corporation Public Company Limited
summary: Amata Corporation Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the planning, developing, managing, and marketing of integrated industrial estates in Thailand and internationally. It also produces, distributes, and treats water for industrial use; provides management services in common area; operates a school; and constructs factory for rent. In addition, the company operates as a REIT manager. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
